title: Smart Moving Reforged
description: Enriches character movement with climbing, crawling, sliding, head jumps and more.
body:
# Smart Moving

**Smart Moving** brings rich, fluid character movement to Minecraft.  
Climb, crawl, slide, head-jump and more — a faithful Fabric 1.21.1 port of the classic **Smart Moving** mod.

***

## ✨ Features

*   **Climbing** – Grab and climb blocks, ladders, vines, fences, and iron bars. Free-climb up surfaces and even traverse ceilings.
*   **Crawling** – Squeeze into 1-block-high gaps by lying down and crawling.
*   **Sliding** – Slide forward to move quickly through tight spaces.
*   **Head Jump** – Launch yourself with a dynamic head-first jump.
*   **Smooth Animations** – Climbing, falling, flying, and movement all come with hand-crafted animations faithful to the original mod.
*   **Multiplayer Support** – All movement and animations are synchronized for other players to see.

***

## 📦 Requirements

*   **Minecraft 1.21.1**
*   **Fabric Loader**
*   **Fabric API** _(required — install it alongside this mod)_

***

## 🔧 Installation

1.  Install [Fabric Loader](https://fabricmc.net/use/).
2.  Download [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) and place it in your `mods` folder.
3.  Download **Smart Moving** and place the `.jar` in your `mods` folder.
4.  Launch the game and enjoy!

***

## 🙏 Credits

This mod is a **Fabric 1.21.1 port** of the original **[Smart Moving](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/smart-moving)** mod, originally created by **Divisor** for older Minecraft versions. All credit for the original concept, mechanics, and animations goes to Divisor. This port aims to faithfully recreate that experience on modern Fabric.

🔗 Original mod: [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/smart-moving](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/smart-moving) (by Divisor)

Ported and maintained by **View-Studio**.

***

This project is licensed under the **GNU General Public License v3.0 (GPL-3.0)**, in accordance with the original mod's license. Source code is available on [GitHub](https://github.com/View-Studio/SmartMoving).

***

## ❤️ Support

If you enjoy this port and want to support the time spent on it, you can support me here: **[☕ Buy me a coffee](https://ko-fi.com/viewstudio)**

_Donations support the porting and maintenance work — the original mod's credit belongs to Divisor._

***

## 🐛 Issues & Feedback

Found a bug or have a suggestion? Please report it on the [issue tracker](https://github.com/View-Studio/SmartMoving/issues).

***
